title: balsamina carnea
intro: Balsamina carnea, also known as Sweet Alyssum or Balsam Apple, is a fragrant, white-flowered annual plant native to the Himalayas. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Balsamina carnea include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as soothing digestive problems and reducing fever. Herbal preparations of Balsamina carnea include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
